raw_question: 迪安诊断2025年第三季度营业总收入与营业总成本的差值是多少
raw_question_json: [{"Q":"迪安诊断2025年第三季度营业总收入与营业总成本的差值是多少"}]

query_plan.question: 迪安诊断2025年第三季度营业总收入与营业总成本的差值是多少

sql: SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, report_period, total_operating_revenue AS 营业总收入, (operating_expense_cost_of_sales + operating_expense_selling_expenses + operating_expense_administrative_expenses + operating_expense_financial_expenses + operating_expense_rnd_expenses + operating_expense_taxes_and_surcharges) AS 营业总成本, total_operating_revenue - (operating_expense_cost_of_sales + operating_expense_selling_expenses + operating_expense_administrative_expenses + operating_expense_financial_expenses + operating_expense_rnd_expenses + operating_expense_taxes_and_surcharges) AS 差值 FROM financials_view WHERE stock_abbr = '迪安诊断' AND report_period = '2025Q3' LIMIT 1
sql_history: SELECT stock_code, stock_abbr, report_period, total_operating_revenue AS 营业总收入, (operating_expense_cost_of_sales + operating_expense_selling_expenses + operating_expense_administrative_expenses + operating_expense_financial_expenses + operating_expense_rnd_expenses + operating_expense_taxes_and_surcharges) AS 营业总成本, total_operating_revenue - (operating_expense_cost_of_sales + operating_expense_selling_expenses + operating_expense_administrative_expenses + operating_expense_financial_expenses + operating_expense_rnd_expenses + operating_expense_taxes_and_surcharges) AS 差值 FROM financials_view WHERE stock_abbr = '迪安诊断' AND report_period = '2025Q3' LIMIT 1

turn_answers.Q: 迪安诊断2025年第三季度营业总收入与营业总成本的差值是多少

A.content: 迪安诊断（股票代码 300244）在 2025 年第三季度的营业总收入为 756,558.67 万元，营业总成本为 701,176.89 万元，两者的差值为 55,381.78 万元。

notes: 根据查询计划，需要查询迪安诊断在2025Q3的营业总收入和营业总成本，并计算差值。视图中没有直接的“营业总成本”字段，但可以通过将各项营业费用相加来近似计算。使用total_operating_revenue作为营业总收入。
